title: TRANSFORMATIONAL MINISTRY - 211info
text: LOVE INC NEWBERG TRANSFORMATIONAL MINISTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a Christian faith-based mentoring program that connects people with church members to help them set goals, develop skills, manage finances, and access information and community resources. Participants are mentored through classes and one-on-one sessions for 8 to 12 weeks. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Serves current Love INC clients Hours: Tuesday 5:45pm-8pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 537-3999 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Carlton, Dayton, Dundee, Lafayette, Newberg, St. Paul, and Yamhill Services: Mentoring Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - WOMEN'S TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM MATERIAL GOODS - GAP MINISTRIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
